purpose: External labeled-set evaluation track (vector). Third-party drawings with third-party human labels — generator/detector circularity structurally removed; scored universe contains real labeled negatives (S-pack vacuous-precision defect closed).

dataset.name: CubiCasa5k
dataset.audit: reports/e2/ext/cubicasa_audit_full.json (5000/5000 parse ok, 371100 wall polygons, thickness px p50=22)
dataset.substrate: tools/e2/ext/cubicasa_ir.py — every polygon/polyline/line edge under the SVG Model group becomes one scored segment with SVG affine transforms accumulated; truth = elements whose nearest classed ancestor has first class token 'Wall'; layer field neutralized to '0' (name-blind by construction, zero label leakage into IR).

protocol.calibration_split: val — scale-estimation strategy, detector threshold, and model hyperparameters may be tuned here.
protocol.evaluation_split: test — single-shot per method rung. No re-evaluation after seeing test results; any pipeline fix discovered post-test requires a new prereg amendment and is reported as a re-run, never silently substituted.
protocol.train_split_use: learning rungs only (classical ML, PU, GNN).
protocol.scale_note: detector v1 thickness prior is physical mm [50,400]; CubiCasa units are px with per-drawing unknown scale. Scale strategies must not consult truth labels of the drawing being scored. Global constant scale calibrated on val is the baseline strategy; dimension-text-derived per-drawing scale is an allowed refinement.
protocol.metrics: per-handle precision/recall/F1 vs truth at the declared threshold, micro over the split; per-drawing macro-F1 reported alongside.
protocol.sentinel: any drawing yielding zero scored segments counts as an error; error rate > 5% of split invalidates the run.

EXT-B1.name: detector v1 transfer
EXT-B1.rule: detector v1 (calibrated on val, frozen) micro-F1 on test >= 0.60
EXT-B1.rationale: transfer is nontrivial if the physical-prior detector holds most of its signal on third-party real drawings; below 0.60 is an honest transfer FAIL with full report.

EXT-B2.name: ladder ordering (learning beats geometry)
EXT-B2.rule: GBDT on detector evidence-channel features, trained on train split, micro-F1 on test >= detector v1 micro-F1 on test
EXT-B2.rationale: same shape as W2-B1: each ladder rung must not lose to the rung below.

EXT-B3.name: anti-permutation control
EXT-B3.rule: GBDT trained on permuted train labels yields test ROC-AUC <= 0.55
EXT-B3.rationale: guards against leakage through the feature pipeline.

EXT-B4.name: name-blind gap
EXT-B4.rule: N/A by construction — IR carries no layer/class names; recorded as design note, no separate arm.
EXT-B4.rationale: the layer channel is neutralized at conversion time, so full arm == name-blind arm on this track.

report_only: error taxonomy of false positives by source class (Door, DimensionMark, BoundaryPolygon, furniture...)
future_rungs: PU learning, GNN, raster-track (FloorPlanCAD masks, qwen2.5-VL local, DGX SFT/GRPO) each get their own band amendment sealed before first test-split contact.
constraints: dataset files are read-only inputs; all derived IR goes to runs/e2_ext_cubicasa/ (regenerable, not committed)
no test-split scoring of any kind before this file is committed (sealed)
